x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: DEX survey data provides the qualitative user sentiment signal that complements device and application metrics. Without survey data, DEX AI is missing the human experience dimension needed for complete digital experience analysis.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Make assignment_group mandatory before incident closure via UI policy. Target: 95%+ of closed incidents with assignment group in the trailing 12 months.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_72f8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c4d
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[DEX survey data provides the qualitative user sentiment signal that complements device and application metrics. Without survey data, DEX AI is missing the human experience dimension needed for complete digital experience analysis.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Assignment Group Population</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1);

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('incident');
    gaTotal.addQuery('state', 'IN', '6,7');
    gaTotal.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No closed incidents in last 12 months',
            finding: 'No closed incidents found in the last 12 months. Assignment group population cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    var gaMissing = new GlideAggregate('incident');
    gaMissing.addQuery('state', 'IN', '6,7');
    gaMissing.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaMissing.addQuery('assignment_group', '');
    gaMissing.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaMissing.query();
    var missing = gaMissing.next() ? parseInt(gaMissing.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var populated = total - missing;
    var pct = Math.round((populated / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of closed incidents have assignment group (last 12 months, ' + populated + '/' + total + ')';

    if (pct >= 95) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of closed incidents have an assignment group. Now Assist ITSM AI routing has strong historical assignment data for routing recommendations.'
        };
    } else if (pct >= 80) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of closed incidents have an assignment group (target: 95%). Now Assist AI routing recommendations will have gaps for unassigned incidents.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of closed incidents have an assignment group. Now Assist ITSM AI routing cannot learn effective assignment patterns without this data.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>ITSM</module><number>CHK0000326</number><order>120</order><remediation_guidance>Make assignment_group mandatory before incident closure via UI policy. Target: 95%+ of closed incidents with assignment group in the trailing 12 months.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>72f8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c4d</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Assignment Group Population</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_72f8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c4d</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
